calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Bridgette Howard appearing on her own behalf. Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to October 24, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
